# Claim Audit — bust_streak_estimate.report.md

## P1 (decision-shaping, must address)

| Quote | Why wrong | Correct number |
|---|---|---|
| "5-worst stacked = 5 \| -$5,580 = -$27,900" | Joint P(5 worst-of-1000) = 10^-15; use typical bust * N | typical 5-streak = -$7,500 |
| "Worst single day = -$5,580 happens daily" | Confuses 1/1000-tail with median outcome | median single-day loss = -$1,500 |

## P2 (misleading framing)

(none)

## P3 (pedantic)

| Quote | Issue | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| "90 days" | trading vs calendar days unclear | clarify: 90 trading days = 4.5 calendar months |
